query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam,
       awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread,
       awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds,
       bookTotal, overOdds, underOdds,
       awayML, homeML,
       openAwaySpread, openHomeSpread, openTotal,
       openAwaySpreadOdds, openHomeSpreadOdds,
       openAwayML, openHomeML
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY id ASC
LIMIT 5 OFFSET 6;
command:

FROM games
